title: Immediate Requirement Production Engineer at Nalco

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Production Engineer at Nalco
jsonLd.description:
Nalco is actively seeking a talented and motivated Production Engineer to join our dynamic team in Pimpri-Chinchwad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Nalco:
Nalco is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in FMEA

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nalco!
